LAW AND MOTION, 301, DEFENDANT JOSEPH CHAVEZ'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGEMENT IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO SEEKING ANY APPROPRIATE RELIEF FROM THE TRIAL JUDGE. THE REQUESTED RELIEF IS NOT APPROPRIATE BECAUSE NO DEFAULT WAS TAKEN AND BECAUSE EVEN IF THERE WERE A DEFAULT, NO EXCUSE IS PROVIDED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. Notice Of Motion And Motion In Support Of Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgement
Off Calendar May-22-2007 Denied
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES- JOSEPH CHAVEZ, TEL. NO. 573-6208, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCE ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED IT'S TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS - DEFENDANT JOSEPH CHAVEZ Motion In Support Of Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgement IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO SEEKING ANY APPROPRIATE RELIEF FROM THE TRIAL JUDGE. THE REQUESTED RELIEF IS NOT APPROPRIATE BECAUSE NO DEFAULT WAS TAKEN AND BECAUSE EVEN IF THERE WERE A DEFAULT, NO EXCUSE IS PROVIDED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER,. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB/PM

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-07-2007 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar May-07-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge Dept. for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: P. Dias, CSR: Patricia Abalos
Jonathan H. Bornstein, Esq. for Plaintiff, 2572-80-3rd Street, LLC, present, Brian McEvoy was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Co-Defendants Joseph Chavez and Borhen Homami
Exhibit 1 - 3 Day Notice to Pay Rent or Quit --------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2 -Residential Tenancy Agreement----------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the tetimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Co-Defendants Joseph Chavez and Borhen Homami as follows:
Restitution and possession of the premises located at 2580 3rd street, #7, San Francisco.
Rental Agreement declared forfeited.
Back Rent and Damages $2,650.00
Costs per memo of costs, for a Total of $8,316.44
Judgment signed in open court.
Counsel stipulated for the return of Exhibits in open court.
